title: CodonTransformer - Noncoding RNA Dataset
author: Fallahpour, Adibvafa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset includes about 45,000 noncoding RNA sequences from Homo sapiens used in validating CodonTransformer model.  CodonTransformer is available at: https://adibvafa.github.io/CodonTransformer
steps_raw: This dataset includes about 45,000 noncoding RNA sequences from Homo sapiens used in validating CodonTransformer model.  CodonTransformer is available at: https://adibvafa.github.io/CodonTransformer
